message:
chore: upgrade lucide-react 0.468.0 -> 1.7.0 and @types/node 22 -> 25 (#5331)

lucide-react v1.0 removed brand icons (Github, Linkedin, Slack). Added
custom SVG brand icon components in icons.ts following the existing
KubernetesWheel pattern, and updated 14 consumer files to import from
@/lib/icons instead of lucide-react.

Deferred: eslint 9->10, tailwindcss 3->4, tailwind-merge 2->3,
typescript 5->6 (all have breaking changes requiring larger migration).

Closes #5307

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

@@ -529,8 +523,75 @@ const KubernetesWheel: LucideIcon = Object.assign(
   { displayName: 'KubernetesWheel' },
 ) as unknown as LucideIcon
 
+/**
+ * Brand icons — removed from lucide-react v1.0 (brand icons are no longer bundled).
+ * Custom SVG implementations that match the lucide style (24x24, stroke-based).
+ */
+
+/** GitHub octocat logo (stroke-based approximation) */
+export const Github: LucideIcon = Object.assign(
+  (props: SVGProps<SVGSVGElement> & { size?: number | string }) => {
+    const { size: s = 24, className, ...rest } = props
+    return createElement('svg', {
+      viewBox: '0 0 24 24', width: s, height: s, className,
+      fill: 'none', stroke: 'currentColor', strokeWidth: '2',
+      strokeLinecap: 'round', strokeLinejoin: 'round', ...rest,
+    },
+      createElement('path', {
+        d: 'M15 22v-4a4.8 4.8 0 0 0-1-3.5c3 0 6-2 6-5.5.08-1.25-.27-2.48-1-3.5.28-1.15.28-2.35 0-3.5 0 0-1 0-3 1.5-2.64-.5-5.36-.5-8 0C6 2 5 2 5 2c-.3 1.15-.3 2.35 0 3.5A5.403 5.403 0 0 0 4 9c0 3.5 3 5.5 6 5.5-.39.49-.68 1.05-.85 1.65-.17.6-.22 1.23-.15 1.85v4',
+      }),
+      createElement('path', { d: 'M9 18c-4.51 2-5-2-7-2' }),
+    )
+  },
+  { displayName: 'Github' },
+) as unknown as LucideIcon
+
+/** LinkedIn logo (stroke-based approximation) */
+export const Linkedin: LucideIcon = Object.assign(
+  (props: SVGProps<SVGSVGElement> & { size?: number | string }) => {
+    const { size: s = 24, className, ...rest } = props
+    return createElement('svg', {
+      viewBox: '0 0 24 24', width: s, height: s, className,
+      fill: 'none', stroke: 'currentColor', strokeWidth: '2',
+      strokeLinecap: 'round', strokeLinejoin: 'round', ...rest,
+    },
+      createElement('path', {
+        d: 'M16 8a6 6 0 0 1 6 6v7h-4v-7a2 2 0 0 0-2-2 2 2 0 0 0-2 2v7h-4v-7a6 6 0 0 1 6-6z',
+      }),
+      createElement('rect', { width: '4', height: '12', x: '2', y: '9' }),
+      createElement('circle', { cx: '4', cy: '4', r: '2' }),
+    )
+  },
+  { displayName: 'Linkedin' },
+) as unknown as LucideIcon
+
+/** Slack logo (stroke-based approximation) */
+export const Slack: LucideIcon = Object.assign(
+  (props: SVGProps<SVGSVGElement> & { size?: number | string }) => {
+    const { size: s = 24, className, ...rest } = props
+    return createElement('svg', {
+      viewBox: '0 0 24 24', width: s, height: s, className,
+      fill: 'none', stroke: 'currentColor', strokeWidth: '2',
+      strokeLinecap: 'round', strokeLinejoin: 'round', ...rest,
+    },
+      createElement('rect', { width: '3', height: '8', x: '13', y: '2', rx: '1.5' }),
+      createElement('path', { d: 'M19 8.5V10h1.5A1.5 1.5 0 1 0 19 8.5' }),
+      createElement('rect', { width: '3', height: '8', x: '8', y: '14', rx: '1.5' }),
+      createElement('path', { d: 'M5 15.5V14H3.5A1.5 1.5 0 1 0 5 15.5' }),
+      createElement('rect', { width: '8', height: '3', x: '14', y: '13', rx: '1.5' }),
+      createElement('path', { d: 'M15.5 19H14v1.5a1.5 1.5 0 1 0 1.5-1.5' }),
+      createElement('rect', { width: '8', height: '3', x: '2', y: '8', rx: '1.5' }),
+      createElement('path', { d: 'M8.5 5H10V3.5A1.5 1.5 0 1 0 8.5 5' }),
+    )
+  },
+  { displayName: 'Slack' },
+) as unknown as LucideIcon
+
 // Add custom icons to registry
 iconRegistry.KubernetesWheel = KubernetesWheel
+iconRegistry.Github = Github
+iconRegistry.Linkedin = Linkedin
+iconRegistry.Slack = Slack
 
 /**
  * Resolve an icon component by name, falling back to HelpCircle if not found.
